outputs.main.sas:
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(rtables)
library(tibble)

# Read ADSL dataset
adsl <- read_xpt("adam/adsl.xpt")

# Filter to All Screened population
adsl_screen <- adsl %>%
  filter(SAFFL == "Y" | ITTFL == "Y" | !is.na(SCRFREAS))

# Create treatment variable
adsl_screen <- adsl_screen %>%
  mutate(TRT01AN = case_when(
    is.na(TRT01AN) ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ TRT01AN
  ),
  TRT01A = case_when(
    TRT01AN == 0 ~ "Placebo",
    TRT01AN == 54 ~ "Xanomeline Low Dose",
    TRT01AN == 81 ~ "Xanomeline High Dose",
    TRUE ~ as.character(TRT01A)
  ))

# Define analysis functions
count_subjects <- function(df, .N_col) {
  n <- nrow(df)
  rcell(n, format = "xx")
}

count_enrolled <- function(df, .N_col) {
  n <- sum(df$RANDFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE)
  rcell(n, format = "xx")
}

count_not_enrolled <- function(df, .N_col) {
  n <- sum(df$RANDFL != "Y" | is.na(df$RANDFL), na.rm = TRUE)
  rcell(n, format = "xx")
}

count_screen_failure <- function(df, reason, .N_col) {
  n <- sum(!is.na(df$SCRFREAS) & df$SCRFREAS == reason, na.rm = TRUE)
  rcell(n, format = "xx")
}

# Get unique screen failure reasons
screen_reasons <- adsl_screen %>%
  filter(!is.na(SCRFREAS)) %>%
  pull(SCRFREAS) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

# Build table layout
lyt <- basic_table(
  title = "Table 14-1.01",
  subtitles = "Screening Summary",
  main_footer = "All Screened Subjects"
) %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01A", split_fun = keep_split_levels(c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose"))) %>%
  analyze("USUBJID", count_subjects, show_labels = "hidden", 
          table_names = "screened", var_labels = "Number of subjects screened") %>%
  analyze("RANDFL", count_enrolled, show_labels = "hidden",
          table_names = "enrolled", var_labels = "  Enrolled") %>%
  analyze("RANDFL", count_not_enrolled, show_labels = "hidden",
          table_names = "not_enrolled", var_labels = "  Not enrolled")

# Add screen failure reasons
for (reason in screen_reasons) {
  lyt <- lyt %>%
    analyze("SCRFREAS", 
            afun = function(x, .N_col) count_screen_failure(data.frame(SCRFREAS = x), reason, .N_col),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            table_names = paste0("reason_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", reason)),
            var_labels = paste0("    ", reason))
}

# Build table
tbl <- build_table(lyt, adsl_screen)

# Export to RTF
rtf_file <- "outputs/t_14_1_01_screening_summary.rtf"
export_as_rtf(tbl, file = rtf_file, 
              page_type = "letter",
              orientation = "landscape",
              colwidths = c(5, rep(2, 3)))

cat("Table generated successfully:", rtf_file, "\n")
